content.subject: Extract structured data from all index.html files
content.description:
Write a comprehensive Python script (or similar) to parse all HTML files found in /data/index. The script must: 1. Iterate over all files. 2. For each file, extract Title (from

), Author (from .book-page-author), Online Text Link (from anchor with 'Online text'), Chapters (from .chapter-download table rows), and Cast details (from 'Character: ...' lines in 'Cast:' sections). 3. Compile this data into a JSON object. 4. For each JSON object created, execute the following Git protocol: create a new branch, write the file, and commit it.
